Target 100% coverage. |

New account-settings module replacing AdminPlaceholder; me overview; user-menu route. Target 100% coverage. |

Target 100% coverage. |

| BI-260063 | Complete the Auth Sign-In/Sign-Up Tab ARIA Pattern | Refined | .github/project/evolution/backlog-items/BI-260063.md | REQ-CR-260022, REQ-QR-260002 | ADR-260053, ADR-260031 | Accessibility polish (pre-existing from BI-260052, noted in BI-260055 review). Add aria-controls/aria-labelledby, roving tabindex, ArrowLeft/Right nav to the auth tabs. |

## Workflow States

- **Idea**: Candidate item, not yet refined.
- **Refined**: Problem and value clarified, ready for prioritization.
- **Ready**: Prioritized and clear enough to start implementation.
- **In Progress**: Actively being delivered.
- **Done**: Implemented and verified.
- **Observed**: Released and measured in real usage.
